title: Asian Growth Companies With Strong Insider Ownership May 2026
content:
As the Asian markets navigate a complex landscape marked by geopolitical tensions and fluctuating economic indicators, investors are increasingly focused on identifying growth opportunities that align with current trends. In this environment, companies with strong insider ownership often stand out, as they may signal confidence from those most familiar with the business's prospects and resilience amidst broader market uncertainties.

Top 10 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership In Asia

Name Insider Ownership Earnings Growth Zhejiang Taotao Vehicles (SZSE:301345) 27.5% 31.5% Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing (SZSE:002384) 33.5% 69.3% Shanghai Biren Technology (SEHK:6082) 11% 124.5% SEERS (KOSDAQ:A458870) 33.2% 41.5% Modetour Network (KOSDAQ:A080160) 12.5% 61.6% Meitu (SEHK:1357) 22.7% 31.5% L&C BIOLTD (KOSDAQ:A290650) 26% 175.4% HUMAN MADE (TSE:456A) 23.9% 22.6% Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology (SZSE:002709) 38.4% 32.5% Great Microwave Technology (SHSE:688270) 21.1% 85.5%

Click here to see the full list of 483 stocks from our Fast Growing Asian Companies With High Insider Ownership screener.

Below we spotlight a couple of our favorites from our exclusive screener.

J&T Global Express

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: J&T Global Express Limited is an investment holding company providing integrated express delivery services across several countries including China, Indonesia, and Brazil, with a market cap of HK$79.21 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue from Transportation - Air Freight amounts to $12.16 billion.

Insider Ownership: 19.1%

J&T Global Express demonstrates strong growth potential with earnings forecasted to rise by 34.11% annually, surpassing the Hong Kong market's growth rate. The company trades at a significant discount to its estimated fair value, and analysts expect a 46.8% stock price increase. Recent results show robust operational momentum, particularly in Southeast Asia, with parcel volume up 26.2% YoY. However, large one-off items impact financial results, suggesting caution is warranted despite high insider ownership.

Click to explore a detailed breakdown of our findings in J&T Global Express' earnings growth report. Our expertly prepared valuation report J&T Global Express implies its share price may be lower than expected.SEHK:1519 Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

Manycore Tech

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Manycore Tech Inc. offers a software-as-a-service platform for computer-aided design and modeling across residential, commercial, and industrial spaces in China and internationally, with a market cap of HK$34.58 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: The company generates revenue of CN¥820.00 million from its software-as-a-service platform, which provides computer-aided design and modeling solutions for various spaces both domestically and globally.

Insider Ownership: 31.1%

Manycore Tech is poised for robust growth with earnings projected to increase by 93.46% annually, although revenue growth at 10.8% per year lags behind the desired rate for high-growth firms. Despite recent substantial insider selling, the company has entered a strategic alliance with Goldstream Investment Limited to enhance global expansion and competitiveness. Following its HKD 1.22 billion IPO, Manycore Tech aims to leverage new partnerships for strategic advancements in spatial intelligence and AI technologies.

Get an in-depth perspective on Manycore Tech's performance by reading our analyst estimates report here. Our valuation report unveils the possibility Manycore Tech's shares may be trading at a premium.SEHK:68 Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable MaterialLtd

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable Material Co., Ltd. and its subsidiaries offer electrical and mechanical insulation solutions both in China and internationally, with a market cap of CN¥29.58 billion.

Operations: ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable Material Co., Ltd. generates revenue through its provision of electrical and mechanical insulation solutions across domestic and international markets.

Insider Ownership: 16.7%

ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable Material Ltd. is positioned for significant growth, with earnings expected to rise by 31% annually and revenue projected to increase by 23.8% per year, outpacing the broader Chinese market. Despite a dividend yield of 0.74% that isn't fully covered by free cash flows, the stock trades at a favorable P/E ratio of 27.4x compared to the market average. Recent financials show Q1 sales grew from CNY 1,759 million to CNY 2,032 million year-over-year while net income slightly declined from CNY 250 million to CNY 231 million.

Unlock comprehensive insights into our analysis of ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable MaterialLtd stock in this growth report. The valuation report we've compiled suggests that ShenZhen Woer Heat-Shrinkable MaterialLtd's current price could be quite moderate.SZSE:002130 Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

ALTEOGEN

Overview: ALTEOGEN Inc. is a biotechnology company specializing in the development of long-acting biobetters, proprietary antibody-drug conjugates, and antibody biosimilars, with a market cap of ₩19.56 trillion.

Operations: The company generates its revenue primarily from the biotechnology segment, amounting to ₩215.86 billion.

Insider Ownership: 25.4%

Alteogen is experiencing robust growth, with revenue expected to rise 43.9% annually, outpacing the KR market. Earnings are forecasted to grow by 41.4% per year, significantly above market averages. Recent strategic alliances, notably with Biogen for subcutaneous biologics formulations using Hybrozyme technology, bolster its growth prospects. This agreement includes an upfront payment of US$20 million and potential milestone payments up to US$549 million, enhancing Alteogen's financial position without recent insider trading activity impacting the stock's outlook.
